features.name: hook_word_count
features.formula: count of words in HOOK_WORDS lexicon (129 words, 10 categories)

features.name: question_count
features.formula: count('?' in text) + sentences starting with INTERROGATIVE_WORDS (23 words)

features.name: second_person_ratio
features.citation: Labrecque et al. 2020; Tan et al. 2014

features.name: first_5s_hook_word_ratio
features.formula: count(words in HOOK_WORDS where word_end <= 5.0) / count(words where word_end <= 5.0)
features.citation: arXiv 2602.22299 'Decoding the Hook'; industry 3-s retention data

features.name: energy_first_3s_ratio
features.citation: Industry 3-s hook retention; V1 RF feature importance 0.0508 (#2)

features.name: pitch_range
features.formula: max(f0) - min(f0) on voiced frames; 0.0 fallback if voiced_fraction < 0.10

features.name: music_presence
features.formula: mean YAMNet probability across 0.96-s frames for classes {Music (132), Musical instrument (137)} summed
features.citation: ECCV 2024 Li et al. arXiv 2410.00289 (SnapUGC 90K, +0.011 SRCC)

features.name: music_fraction
features.formula: fraction of YAMNet frames with music score > 0.3

features.name: speech_music_ratio
features.formula: mean of classes {Speech(0), Narration(3), Conversation(4)} divided by (mean(music) + 1e-6)
features.citation: Composition proxy; ECCV 2024 treats speech/music as separate signals

features.name: laughter_peak
features.formula: max Gillick laughter-detection probability over 30 s
features.citation: Gillick et al. 2021 Interspeech (F1 0.75-0.80 vs YAMNet 0.55-0.65)

features.name: arousal_mean
features.citation: Wagner et al. 2023 IEEE TAC; CCC 0.745 on MSP-Podcast

features.name: arousal_std
features.formula: std of per-window arousal over 5-s windows with 2.5-s hop (12 windows per 30 s)

features.name: arousal_peak
features.citation: Kahneman peak-end rule; Applied Soft Computing 2025 Kim et al.

features.name: arousal_arc_direction
features.citation: Berger & Milkman 2012 (arousal is #1 viral predictor); symmetry with valence_arc_direction

features.name: dover_aesthetic_score
features.formula: DOVER aesthetic branch, averaged over 5 sampled frames at t={0,6,12,18,24}s
features.citation: Wu et al. ICCV 2023 (SRCC 0.91 KoNViD-1k); ECCV 2024 Snap #1 visual contributor; VQualA 2025 rank-2 IMCL-DAMO

features.name: dover_technical_score
features.formula: DOVER technical branch, averaged over 5 frames
features.citation: Wu et al. ICCV 2023; subsumes sharpness

features.name: clip_embedding
features.formula: mean-pooled CLIP ViT-L/14 image embedding over 5 frames, PCA-projected to min-components-for-95%-variance (capped at 32)
features.notes: With GPU batching across 8 segments (lever B) and 5-frame sampling (lever A), effective cost is ~200ms/segment amortised

features.name: colorfulness
features.formula: Hasler-Suesstrunk: C = sqrt(sigma_rg^2 + sigma_yb^2) + 0.3*sqrt(mu_rg^2 + mu_yb^2); rg=|R-G|, yb=|0.5(R+G)-B|; averaged across 5 frames
features.citation: Hasler & Suesstrunk 2003 SPIE; Chen et al. 2025 JBR

features.name: brightness_mean
features.citation: Chen et al. 2025 JBR; ECCV 2024 VQA baseline

features.name: cut_count
features.formula: TransNetV2 hard-cut count over full 30 s at 48x27 resolution
features.citation: Soucek & Lokoc arXiv 2008.04838 (SOTA on ClipShots/BBC); Ling et al. 2022 for TikTok virality link

features.name: face_present_ratio
features.formula: fraction of 5 sampled frames with at least one SCRFD detection (conf >= 0.5)

features.name: largest_face_area_ratio_max
features.formula: max over 5 frames of (largest face bbox area) / (frame area)
features.citation: Ling et al. 2022 close-up shot finding

features.name: face_count_median
features.formula: median number of detected faces per frame across 5 frames
features.citation: Ling et al. 2022 (number of people in frame)

features.name: position_ratio
features.formula: direct copy from labeled.position_ratio = start_time / video_duration
features.citation: Gygli et al. 2014 ECCV; V1 #1 category

features.name: is_intro
features.source_data: labeled CSV (overrides V2 is_first_quarter which uses 0.25)

features.name: is_first_segment
features.citation: V1; distinct from is_intro for long videos

features.name: segment_novelty_to_neighbors
features.formula: 1 - mean(cosine_sim(this.clip_embedding, prev.clip_embedding), cosine_sim(this.clip_embedding, next.clip_embedding)); for first/last segment, use only the one available neighbour
features.source_data: derived from clip_embedding after per-video pass
features.citation: Islam et al. WACV 2025 'Unsupervised Video Highlight Detection from Audio-Visual Recurrence'

features.name: creator_category_encoded
features.formula: one-hot over {tech, education, entertainment, fitness, commentary}
features.citation: V2 discovery per-category positive rates (1.02%-1.43%); captures content-pattern differences not absorbed by creator-relative label

deprecated_features.name: compound_score
deprecated_features.reason: VADER on ASR; V1 ablation +0.003 AUC when removed

deprecated_features.name: emotional_intensity
deprecated_features.reason: Derivative of noisy VADER

deprecated_features.name: positive_ratio
deprecated_features.reason: Same

deprecated_features.name: negative_ratio
deprecated_features.reason: Same

deprecated_features.name: sentiment_arc_range
deprecated_features.reason: Same

deprecated_features.name: sentiment_variance
deprecated_features.reason: Same

deprecated_features.name: sentiment_change_rate
deprecated_features.reason: Same

deprecated_features.name: peak_sentiment
deprecated_features.reason: Same

deprecated_features.name: sentiment_arc_direction
deprecated_features.reason: Replaced by audio-based valence_arc_direction

deprecated_features.name: avg_sentence_length
deprecated_features.reason: V1 ablation weak; no direct per-feature virality citation. Dropped in 2026-04-18 lock.

deprecated_features.name: lexical_diversity
deprecated_features.reason: V1 ablation weak; Guiraud's Index length-biased. Dropped in 2026-04-18 lock.

deprecated_features.name: discourse_marker_count
deprecated_features.reason: No ablation evidence for 18-word set. Dropped in 2026-04-18 lock.

deprecated_features.name: spectral_centroid
deprecated_features.reason: V1 README flags weak; generic VQA proxy. Dropped in 2026-04-18 lock.

deprecated_features.name: hnr_mean
deprecated_features.reason: No direct virality citation; free compute not sufficient justification. Dropped in 2026-04-18 lock.

deprecated_features.name: sharpness_mean
deprecated_features.reason: Subsumed by DOVER technical branch. Dropped in 2026-04-18 lock.

deprecated_features.name: text_present_ratio
deprecated_features.reason: Ling 2022 evidence qualitative; PaddleOCR 23% of visual compute. Dropped in 2026-04-18 lock.

deprecated_features.name: text_area_ratio_mean
deprecated_features.reason: Same as text_present_ratio. Dropped in 2026-04-18 lock.

deprecated_features.name: text_word_count_mean
deprecated_features.reason: Same as text_present_ratio. Dropped in 2026-04-18 lock.

deprecated_features.name: creator_subscriber_bracket
deprecated_features.reason: Label is creator-relative (median-based); subscriber size is absorbed into target. Redundant feature. Dropped in 2026-04-18 lock.

deprecated_features.name: creator_median_engagement
deprecated_features.reason: Feeding the label's own denominator; leakage-adjacent. Dropped in 2026-04-18 lock.

data_sources.notes: 389,619 segments x 3 files (wav+mp4+jpg) = 1,168,857 expected, extras are minor. Audio WAV exactly 960,078 bytes per full 30s segment.

levers_applied: B: GPU batching across 8 segments for CLIP + DOVER

2026-04-18_initial_draft.notes: Based on V2 README + parallel research agents on visual/audio/text/multimodal. 3 OCR features, 3 creator-context features including subscriber bracket.

2026-04-18_locked.rationale: Dropped V1-weak features (V1 ablation evidence), features with no direct virality citation, features redundant with creator-relative label (size absorbed by target). Added symmetric arousal arc and CLIP-derived novelty (both research-cited, free to compute).
